text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, no, it's nothing. I just haven't been
sleeping well of late.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky found me taking a nap the other day.
She says I was talking in my sleep about student
council business.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even in my dreams, I have no respite from my
duties, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that's why I feel as though I've hardly
slept at all. Frankly, I struggle to discern whether
I'm dreaming or awake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Symboli Rudolf's lack of proper
sleep is becoming a real problem...
